overview: Career Sandbox is a responsive web app for students in grades 10-12 that guides them through personalized career exploration journeys. Starting with a personality-based mindset quiz, students discover which of four career streams — Content & Gaming, Science, Commerce, or Arts — best matches who they are. Each stream features quizzes and micro-projects, culminating in a downloadable 3-5 year career roadmap. A premium subscription unlocks full access to all streams, roadmap generation, and support resources.
features: Minecraft-style rotating motivational quotes on the landing screen
Personality mindset quiz (non-career questions) that routes you to a matching career stream
4 career streams: Content & Gaming, Science, Commerce, and Arts — each with quizzes and micro-projects
Personalized 3-5 year career roadmap downloadable as a PDF
Static emotional support section with FAQ and curated resource links
Premium subscription page with Stripe checkout unlocking all features
Internet Identity login for secure, premium-gated access
Fully responsive design for mobile and laptop
